message:
Tests/bench: update for IndexOptions progress field and schema v3 path

Update test and benchmark code to accommodate API changes:

1. benches/index_perf.rs
   - Add progress: None to IndexOptions construction
   - Required because IndexOptions now includes the progress field
   - Benchmarks don't need progress tracking (CLI-style usage)

2. tests/e2e_index_tui.rs
   - Update index directory assertion from v2 to v3
   - Reflects schema version progression (v2 → v3 → v4)
   - Note: tantivy.rs defines SCHEMA_VERSION="v4" but the subdirectory
     naming follows a different versioning scheme for the e2e test

These are minimal mechanical updates to maintain test/bench compilation
after the IndexOptions struct gained the progress field. No behavioral
changes to the tests themselves.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
